policies.name: profiles_select
policies.using:
id = auth.uid()
  or exists (
    select 1
    from public.projects p
    where p.owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
      and (
        p.owner_profile_id = id
        or exists (
          select 1
          from public.project_members pm_target
          where pm_target.project_id = p.id
            and pm_target.profile_id = id
        )
      )
  )
  or exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_members pm_self
    join public.projects p
      on p.id = pm_self.project_id
    where pm_self.profile_id = auth.uid()
      and p.owner_profile_id = id
  )

policies.name: projects_select
policies.using:
owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  or exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_members pm
    where pm.project_id = id
      and pm.profile_id = auth.uid()
  )

policies.name: projects_update
policies.using:
owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  or exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_members pm
    where pm.project_id = id
      and pm.profile_id = auth.uid()
      and pm.role = 'co_owner'
  )

policies.name: projects_delete
policies.using:
owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  or exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_members pm
    where pm.project_id = id
      and pm.profile_id = auth.uid()
      and pm.role = 'co_owner'
  )

policies.name: project_members_select
policies.using:
profile_id = auth.uid()
  or exists (
    select 1
    from public.projects p
    where p.id = project_id
      and p.owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  )

policies.name: project_members_insert
policies.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.projects p
    where p.id = project_id
      and p.owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  )
  and (
    role <> 'owner'
    or profile_id = (
      select p.owner_profile_id
      from public.projects p
      where p.id = project_id
    )
  )

policies.name: project_members_update
policies.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.projects p
    where p.id = project_id
      and p.owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  )
  and profile_id <> (
    select p.owner_profile_id
    from public.projects p
    where p.id = project_id
  )
policies.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.projects p
    where p.id = project_id
      and p.owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  )
  and profile_id <> (
    select p.owner_profile_id
    from public.projects p
    where p.id = project_id
  )

policies.name: project_members_delete
policies.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.projects p

      and p.owner_profile_id = auth.uid()
  )
  and profile_id <> (
    select p.owner_profile_id
    from public.projects p
    where p.id = project_id
  )

policies.withCheck:

  and exists (

    from public.tasks t
    where t.id = task_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(t.project_id)
  )
